title: carapichea dolichophylla
intro: Carapichea dolichophylla, also known as Iascourt, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Amazon rainforest and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Carapichea dolichophylla can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
